name: -n
--line-number
options.description: Prefix each line of output with its line number

name: -c
--count
options.description: Print only a count of matching lines per file

name: -l
--files-with-matches
options.description: Print only names of files containing matches

name: -L
--files-without-match
options.description: Print only names of files containing no match

name: -E
--extended-regexp
options.description: Interpret the pattern as an extended regular expression

name: -F
--fixed-strings
options.description: Interpret the pattern as fixed strings, not a regex

name: -o
--only-matching
options.description: Print only the matched parts of a line

name: -e
--regexp
options.description: Use the next argument as a pattern
